Be sure to update if you have enabled it! Full release notes and update instructions are available on the GitHub releases page. https:// github.com/mastodon/mastodon/r elease…
content:
We just released Mastodon 4.5.7, 4.4.14, and 4.3.20.

These versions contain various bug fixes. In particular, 4.5.7 and 4.4.14 include security fixes for the experimental FASP feature. Be sure to update if you have enabled it!

Full release notes and update instructions are available on the GitHub releases page.

https://github.com/mastodon/mastodon/releases

#mastoadmin
